sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83599" key="platurhmosu/nh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλᾰτῠ-ρημοσύνη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ῥῆμα</etym>) <sense id="n83599.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">breadth in speaking,</tr_> i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prolixity,</tr_> Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:35" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">35</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
